basic_info.title: Fire Emblem: Three Houses
basic_info.review: A masterpiece of the genre that successfully blends deep tactical combat with engaging character simulation, offering three distinct narratives that reward replayability.

play_today.details: The definitive version with all DLC content available via Expansion Pass. Best experience in handheld mode for portability, or docked for better visuals.

recommended_patches.name: Expansion Pass
recommended_patches.description: Official DLC adding 4 waves of content including new characters (Hilda, Sylvain, etc.), story routes, and gameplay features

recommended_patches.name: 1.2.0 Update
recommended_patches.description: Official update adding unit appearance customization and quality-of-life improvements

play_today.details: A secondary recommendation for players who prefer the original 30 FPS experience but want to utilize community mods. This version supports various UI overhauls and quality-of-life improvements that are not available on the base game. It is ideal for those who want to customize their experience without the complexity of full emulation.

recommended_patches.name: Aldebaran Mod Loader
recommended_patches.description: Essential mod loader for the Nintendo Switch version that enables the installation of gameplay, UI, and graphical mods via Atmosphere CFW.

recommended_patches.name: Enbarr Edition
recommended_patches.description: A comprehensive rebalance mod for the Nintendo Switch version that overhauls classes, spells, and weapon types to create unique identities for characters.

recommended_patches.name: Teaspoon Translations
recommended_patches.description: A fan translation patch for the Nintendo Switch version that improves the English localization of story events, supports, and character information.

recommended_patches.name: 60 FPS Unlock Patch
recommended_patches.description: Removes the 30 FPS cap for the Nintendo Switch version when played on emulators, significantly improving combat fluidity and menu navigation.

recommended_patches.name: No Outlines Mod
recommended_patches.description: A graphical quality-of-life mod for the Nintendo Switch version that removes the black outlines around characters for a cleaner visual experience.

optimal_settings: Enable 60 FPS Unlock via Game Settings
Set Internal Resolution to 2x or 4x for sharper visuals
Enable Async GPU for improved performance
Set CPU Accuracy to 'High' for stability
Enable 60 FPS Unlock in Game Settings
Use Vulkan Backend for optimal performance
Enable 'Use Disk Cache' for faster load times

description.synopsis: Set in the continent of Fódlan, the game follows Byleth, a mercenary who becomes a professor at the Officers Academy. The player must choose to lead one of three houses, each aligned with a different faction in a brewing civil war. As the conflict escalates, Byleth's choices determine the fate of the continent and the future of the church.
key_features: Three distinct story paths based on house selection
Class-based character progression with unique skill trees
Turn-based tactical combat with terrain and weapon triangle mechanics
Social simulation phase with bonding and support conversations
Dual-phase battle system (Day/Night) with strategic movement
Paralogue system for optional side missions and character development
Dynamic difficulty settings including Casual and Classic modes
Multiplayer mode with custom map creation and online battles
Character customization through skill inheritance and class mastery
Narrative branching that alters the ending based on player choices
legacy_and_impact: Fire Emblem: Three Houses revitalized the franchise for a global audience, becoming one of the best-selling entries in the series. It set a new standard for narrative depth in tactical RPGs, proving that complex storytelling and strategic gameplay can coexist seamlessly.
